1.Name: Glimmering Rhythm
1.Description:
Mon. Wed. Fri. Sun.
12:00-13:00
15:00-16:00
18:00-19:00
21:00-22:00 (UTC-2)
Join dancer Zoraida in front of the Starland Stage for group dancing—come move to the rhythm!

107.Name: Unstable Space
107.Description: Daily trials prepared by the Pioneer Bureau to test adventurers' basic combat skills and adaptability.

108.Name: Chaotic Realm
108.Description: High-intensity simulation trials established by the Pioneer Bureau to handle high-risk events. It is used to evaluate adventurers' comprehensive combat capabilities under extreme conditions. Entrances to various Chaotic Realms are distributed here.

112.Name: Fashion Store
112.Description: Meowlux Fashion Store, offering a variety of styles for you to choose from!

115.Name: Gear Store
115.Description: You can use alloy shards to exchange for various gear. Go check it out.

117.Name: Weapon Crafting
117.Description: The Artisan Guild in Asterleeds has mastered exquisite forging techniques and can provide weapon crafting services.

118.Name: Culinary and Exchange
118.Description: The bubbling hot cauldron has the magical ability to transform raw materials into gourmet dishes. Try putting the ingredients you harvest from the world into it, and you might get various wonderful dishes with unexpected beneficial effects...

119.Name: Culinary Exchange
119.Description: You can exchange for the materials needed for cooking with a Culinary Instructor.

120.Name: Star Chest and Module Exchange
120.Description: You can collect materials to exchange for various development tools, including Star Chests and modules.

121.Name: Decoration Recycling
121.Description: Special decorations can be recycled here!

122.Name: Ocean Garbage Recycling
122.Description: This is the Ocean Waste Recycling Station! Protecting the marine environment is everyone's responsibility!

123.Name: Battle Will Exchange
123.Description: You can exchange Battle Will here, come find me quickly!

124.Name: Fresh Meat Store
124.Description: The freshest meat is here, come find me!

125.Name: Seafood Store
125.Description: The best-selling stall at the dock fish market. Go check it out!

126.Name: Shard Store
126.Description: Various chips can be exchanged here, come find me!

127.Name: Homestead Certificate Recycle
127.Description: Turn in Homestead Certificate here for recycling!

128.Name: Goods Recycler
128.Description: You can recycle unwanted items here!

411.Name: Alchemy and Exchange
411.Description: Alchemy can transform unrelated materials into powerful potions or luxurious dyes.

412.Name: Smelting and Exchange
412.Description: Smelting is the skill of processing metal ores using Bapharian Legacy machinery.

413.Name: Gemcrafting & Exchange
413.Description: Gemcrafting is the art of processing various crystals and gemstones using the Bapharian Legacy machinery.

415.Name: Botany Exchange
415.Description: By understanding the habits of plants, fungi, and other organisms, and collecting them in a reasonable way to avoid damaging the planet's habitat, this is Botany.

416.Name: Mineral Exchange
416.Description: By exploring geology to find valuable ores and extracting them through certain techniques, this is the science of Mineralogy.

417.Name: Crystal Exchange
417.Description: Beautiful Gems can not only be used as jewelry but are also very important combat resources for adventurers.

418.Name: Alchemy Exchange
418.Description: You can find the Alchemy Instructor to exchange for materials needed for Alchemy.

419.Name: Smelting Exchange
419.Description: You can find the Smelting Instructor to exchange for materials needed for Smelting.

420.Name: Gemcrafting Exchange
420.Description: You can exchange for crafting materials from the Gemcrafting Instructor.

421.Name: Artisanry Exchange
421.Description: You can find the Artisanry Instructor to exchange for materials needed for Artisanry.

422.Name: Class Exchange
422.Description: Here, you can trade skill books and sigils for those of another profession.

423.Name: Artisanry Exchange
423.Description: Talk to the Artisanry Instructor to exchange for materials needed for Artisanry.

424.Name: Weaving Exchange
424.Description: Talk to the Weaving Instructor to exchange for materials needed for weaving.

425.Name: Sigil Recycling & Exchange
425.Description: You can visit Erica to recycle excess Sigils or exchange Sigil Shards for various Sigils.

504.Name: Asterleeds Fishing Spot
504.Description: Fishing spots recommended by experienced fishermen, said to have an exceptionally rich variety of fish species.

505.Name: Bureau Commissions
505.Description: The Pioneer Bureau will post daily commission tasks here, assisting the Pioneer Bureau in completing commissions can earn you considerable rewards!

506.Name: Seawater Fishing Spot
506.Description: Fishing spots recommended by sailors of Asteria, rich in seawater fish resources.

507.Name: Freshwater Fishing Spot
507.Description: The fishing spot recommended by the tribesmen of Asteria, which has abundant freshwater fish resources.

508.Name: Fallen River fishing spot
508.Description: A fishing spot recommended by the sailors of Asteria, boasting a rich variety of saltwater fish.

509.Name: Mine Vicinity Fishing Spot
509.Description: A fishing spot recommended by the tribal residents of Asteria, boasting a rich variety of freshwater fish.

667.Name: Go to the Land of Crimson Illusion

701.Name: Laura (Guild Administrator)
701.Description: The administrator of the Guild, in charge of the upgrade function of the Guild Center.

702.Name: Practice Room
702.Description: The practice room administrator of the Guild center, you can confront wooden dummies in the practice room here.

703.Name: Leisure Area
703.Description: The leisure area administrator of the Guild, the leisure area is still under construction, let's look forward to it!

704.Name: Grocery Store
704.Description: The grocery store administrator of the Guild, you can exchange items with her using Guild Token.

706.Name: Boon Fountain
706.Description: An Guild building with certain energy, after activation, all Guild members can gain corresponding attribute bonuses.

707.Name: Guild Animation Gallery
707.Description: Animation Gallery! After upgrading, you can set the photos in the Guild album to be displayed, come and try it!

708.Name: Guild Cargo
708.Description: You can find the Guild Cargo Administrator daily to complete Guild Cargo Quests and receive generous rewards upon completion!

709.Name: Exit Guild Center
709.Description: This is the gate of the Guild Center.

710.Name: Enter Guild Center
710.Description: You can enter the Guild Center after talking to Nora, or you can enter from the Guild Interface!

711.Name: Guild ID Machine
711.Description: A machine used to customize avatars and Namecard photos. Put on your favorite outfit to create a personalized avatar and Namecard photo!

712.Name: Shared Warehouse
712.Description: Invite partners to join the shared warehouse, share storage space to store and exchange items.

713.Name: Guild Hunt
713.Description: When the Guild Hunt Activity starts, find the Guild Hunt Administrator to enter the activity!

714.Name: Parkour Registration
714.Description: Sign up here for the heart-pounding City Rally and Wasteland Race!

715.Name: Stimen Vaults Entrance
715.Description: Entrance to the Stimen Vaults, available for exploration.

716.Name: Imagine Research
716.Description: Mason's Imagine Research Institute offers Imagine crafting, Imagine decomposition, and Battle Will exchange services. Additionally, you can learn some information about Imagine.

717.Name: Module Workshop
717.Description: Miss Grace from the Artisan Guild is an expert in modules. She can provide information on modules and handle module exchange and dismantling.

718.Name: Gear Workshop
718.Description: The senior Artisan Maxim, who is skilled in forging, can undertake various tasks such as gear resmelting , refining, inlaying, and decomposition.

719.Name: Trading Center
719.Description: Trade with adventurers from all over the world here!

720.Name: Wish
720.Description: Although Maribel's main job is to provide Wish services, it seems that more people come to take photos with her than to use the Wish...

721.Name: Beauty
721.Description: Customize your own unique style! Zoe's Beauty Salon, cutting your way to a new level of attractiveness!

722.Name: Meowlux Membership Store
722.Description: Meowlux Stewards are waiting for your visit~

723.Name: World Boss Crusade
723.Description: Join Captain Viktor and brave adventurers to challenge the world boss!

724.Name: Trial Path
724.Description: Step onto the Path of Trials. Face countless trials and rise to become your most powerful self.

725.Name: Pioneer Award
725.Description: Complete as many Pioneer goals as possible each week and receive your Pioneer rewards next week!

726.Name: Dance Novice
726.Description:
Mon. Wed. Fri. Sun.
15:00-16:00
17:00-18:00
20:00-21:00
23:00-24:00(UTC-2)
Join dancer Zoraida on the central bridge for group dancing-come move to the rhythm!

727.Name: Street Theater
727.Description:
Tue. Thu. Sat. Sun.
15:00-16:00
17:00-18:00
20:00-21:00
23:00-24:00(UTC-2)
A character roleplay showcase is underway on the streets of Asterleeds! Dress up as the assigned role and compete for votes-join the fun!

728.Name: Merchant
728.Description: Homestead Store. Offers a selection of homestead-related items.

729.Name: Quest
729.Description: Traveling Merchants' Commissions. They are looking to purchase homestead items.

730.Name: Cleaning
730.Description: Personal Homestead Butler. Helps you quickly clean up clutter in your homestead.

731.Name: Void Relic Exchange
731.Description: Find the Floating Island Envoy Cassie to exchange or craft special gear.

734.Name: Joyous Emissary
734.Description: Have some mini-games to recharge between battles! Call your friends and join the fun!

735.Name: Cargo Submission Point
735.Description:
Collect scattered cargo in the area and submit it here to earn rewards.
Beware! All Entries and Dim Dreamstones will be cleared upon switching scenes, changing lines, or logging out!

736.Name: Illusion Inscription
736.Description:
Collect 4 types of Illusion Inscriptions and come here to claim inscription rewards.
Beware! All Entries and Dim Dreamstones will be cleared upon switching scenes, changing lines, or logging out!

737.Name: Safe Zone 1
737.Description:
You cannot attack or take DMG inside the Safe Zone!
Dim Dreamstones obtained in the Illusion can be exchanged for rewards at Illusion Nappo! They can also be exchanged for Entries at Illusion Ee-chan to boost your stats!
200 Dim Dreamstones for 10 Seeds of Floating Dreams.
900 Dim Dreamstones for 90 Seeds of Floating Dreams.
Beware! All Entries and Dim Dreamstones will be cleared upon switching scenes, changing lines, or logging out!

738.Name: The Drifting Cocoon
738.Description:
Each round, the Drifting Cocoon will condense at several spots. During the Condensation Phase, only faint silhouettes can be seen. After condensation, it enters a Diffusion Phase, during which many illusion monsters appear nearby!
Beware! All Entries and Dim Dreamstones will be cleared upon switching scenes, changing lines, or logging out!

739.Name: Safe Zone 2
739.Description:
You cannot attack or take DMG inside the Safe Zone!
Dim Dreamstones obtained in the Illusion can be exchanged for rewards at Illusion Nappo! They can also be exchanged for Entries at Illusion Ee-chan to boost your stats!
200 Dim Dreamstones for 10 Seeds of Floating Dreams.
900 Dim Dreamstones for 90 Seeds of Floating Dreams.
Beware! All Entries and Dim Dreamstones will be cleared upon switching scenes, changing lines, or logging out!

740.Name: Safe Zone 3
740.Description:
You cannot attack or take DMG inside the Safe Zone!
Dim Dreamstones obtained in the Illusion can be exchanged for rewards at Illusion Nappo! They can also be exchanged for Entries at Illusion Ee-chan to boost your stats!
200 Dim Dreamstones for 10 Seeds of Floating Dreams.
900 Dim Dreamstones for 90 Seeds of Floating Dreams.
Beware! All Entries and Dim Dreamstones will be cleared upon switching scenes, changing lines, or logging out!

741.Name: Safe Zone 4
741.Description:
You cannot attack or take DMG inside the Safe Zone!
Dim Dreamstones obtained in the Illusion can be exchanged for rewards at Illusion Nappo! They can also be exchanged for Entries at Illusion Ee-chan to boost your stats!
200 Dim Dreamstones for 10 Seeds of Floating Dreams.
900 Dim Dreamstones for 90 Seeds of Floating Dreams.
Beware! All Entries and Dim Dreamstones will be cleared upon switching scenes, changing lines, or logging out!

742.Name: Parade! Charming Fish
742.Description:
The Fishing Guild is hosting the "Charming Fish Parade." Hurry, bring your fish and join the fun!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

743.Name: Boarlet Knight Parade
743.Description:
A Lovely Boarlet has appeared in town! She's the mascot of the Boarlet Riders. Mount a Boarlet to join her riding parade!
Receive Friendship Points and Gear for your first participation each day. Repeated participation on the same day grants a small amount of Friendship Points. A weekly cap applies.

745.Name: Dream Separator
745.Description:
You must defeat the final Boss via the Dream Separator to bring Slumberdream Remnants out of the dreamscape!
Alternatively, you can spend Slumberdream Remnants to waken allies trapped in the Slumberdream!
Note: The Dream Separator in each area summons a different final Boss. Areas with higher Slumberdream Values have more powerful final Bosses!

746.Name: Dreamscape Event
746.Description: Complete the event to obtain large amounts of Slumberdream Remnants!

747.Name: Slumberdream Valley
747.Description:
To combat the highlands' Illusory Plague, researchers extracted energy from Illusory Blooms and created an illusion testing ground—Slumberdream Valley. However, illusion power is impossible to fully control, and everything within has become unpredictable.
Artisans forged defensive devices at the entrance, while adventurers ventured deep within to uncover its secrets. Some lost themselves, sinking into the dreamscape forever. This place is both a land of irresistible temptation and a beacon of hope for restoring peace to the highlands.

748.Name: Mahjong
748.Description: The Starland Club is now open! A large number of Mahjong tables are available on the second floor. Just pull up a seat and play! Grab your friends and give it a try, Adventurer!

749.Name: Dream Separator (District 1)
749.Description:
You must defeat the final Boss via the Dream Separator to bring Slumberdream Remnants out of the dreamscape!
Alternatively, you can spend Slumberdream Remnants to waken allies trapped in the Slumberdream!
Note: The Dream Separator in each area summons a different final Boss. Areas with higher Slumberdream Values have more powerful final Bosses!

750.Name: Dream Separator (District 2)
750.Description:
You must defeat the final Boss via the Dream Separator to bring Slumberdream Remnants out of the dreamscape!
Alternatively, you can spend Slumberdream Remnants to waken allies trapped in the Slumberdream!
Note: The Dream Separator in each area summons a different final Boss. Areas with higher Slumberdream Values have more powerful final Bosses!

751.Name: Dream Separator (District 3)
751.Description:
You must defeat the final Boss via the Dream Separator to bring Slumberdream Remnants out of the dreamscape!
Alternatively, you can spend Slumberdream Remnants to waken allies trapped in the Slumberdream!
Note: The Dream Separator in each area summons a different final Boss. Areas with higher Slumberdream Values have more powerful final Bosses!

752.Name: Dream Separator (District 4)
752.Description:
You must defeat the final Boss via the Dream Separator to bring Slumberdream Remnants out of the dreamscape!
Alternatively, you can spend Slumberdream Remnants to waken allies trapped in the Slumberdream!
Note: The Dream Separator in each area summons a different final Boss. Areas with higher Slumberdream Values have more powerful final Bosses!

753.Name: Dream Separator (District 5)
753.Description:
You must defeat the final Boss via the Dream Separator to bring Slumberdream Remnants out of the dreamscape!
Alternatively, you can spend Slumberdream Remnants to waken allies trapped in the Slumberdream!
Note: The Dream Separator in each area summons a different final Boss. Areas with higher Slumberdream Values have more powerful final Bosses!

754.Name: Ee-chan Drum Band
754.Description:
Daily 10:00-24:00
Boom, boom, bong! Come perform with Ee-chan! Join the Ee-chan Drum Band to turn into a cute performing Ee-chan. Have fun with your friends as you lay down an island beat!

755.Name: Glimmering Rhythm
755.Description: Come join Meowqi and dance away your worries with the beat! "Are you ready? The moment the music starts, you'll be the brightest star on the island! Meow~"

756.Name: Tonight, Sing with the Stars
756.Description:
Opening Hours: Every Friday, Saturday, and Sunday
19:05–19:13
When night falls, songs and stars intertwine, converging into a bright and special light at this very moment. Head to the stage and listen to the song in the girl's heart!

757.Name: Wondrous Tag
757.Description:
All Day; Recommend: 5-20 Players
Join other adventurers and transform into a Shadow Hunter or Stalker for a tense, exciting, and fun game of tag!

800.Name: Snow's Gift Exchange
800.Description: During the Winterfest event, you can exchange Snow's Gifts here for rewards!

801.Name: Snow Nappo
801.Description:
Snowman Soldiers, Assemble and Strike!
During 03:00-05:00, 11:00-13:00, and 19:00-21:00
on 12/24, 12/25, 12/26, 12/27, 12/31
and 1/1, 1/2, 1/3, mischievous Snow Nappos will appear in the plains! They spawn every 10 minutes during these periods. Transform into a snowman, join the joyful chase, and defeat them to win exclusive rewards!
Snow Nappos are immune to adventurers' skills and can only be attacked by snowmen.
Once entering combat, Snow Nappos will gradually melt. Keep up the fight, and you will eventually defeat them.

802.Name: Morph Party
802.Description:
Morph Party: Let the Celebration Begin!
Immerse yourself in ancient traditions and discover the magic of random morphs in this winter wonderland of lights and imagination!

803.Name: Year Demon Strikes
803.Description: Alert! The Year Demon strikes! Anomaly detected in front of the Plains Outpost! Adventurers, assemble! Head to Andra Outpost and use the special item "Firecracker" to suppress the Year Demon and protect the peace of the Renewal Festival!

804.Name: Colorflare Trial
804.Description: Don't just keep your New Year's wishes in your heart—let them soar with brilliant fireworks! During the event, firework launchers will be set up throughout the festival area. Use gunpowder of different colors to light up the sky with your own special spark.

805.Name: Spring Lantern Fair
805.Description: Awaken the spring breeze with lively celebrations and mark the Renewal Light with lanterns. Collect and release lanterns of four colors to light up the sky over Asterleeds together.

806.Name: Sea Breeze Feast
806.Description:
The adventurer's footprints fade, but the sea breeze remembers. As it sweeps along the long streets and the lights glow warmly, the feast unfolds. The "Sea Breeze Feast" arrives as promised.
It is the unspoken greeting this port city offers to travelers.
Banquet Food: Grants Strength, Agility, and Intellect +500 for 2 hours when consumed.

1002.Name: Laser Cyclone
1002.Description:
Daily
10:00-11:00; 13:00-14:00
15:00-16:00; 18:00-19:00
20:00-21:00; 23:00-24:00
Recommend: 2-10 Players
Step to the rhythm, dodge the sweeping lasers, and see how many rounds you can last!

1003.Name: Fish Frenzy
1003.Description:
Daily
09:00-10:00; 11:00-12:00
14:00-15:00; 16:00-17:00
19:00-20:00; 21:00-22:00
Recommend: 2-6 Players
Three, two, one... the fish are flying! Focus and see how many you can catch!

1004.Name: One-Punch Brawl
1004.Description:
Daily
09:00-10:00; 12:00-13:00
14:00-15:00; 17:00-18:00
19:00-20:00; 22:00-23:00
Recommend: 2-10 Players
Which Nappo is acting suspicious? A fake Nappo has snuck into the area. Spot the odd one out, aim, and knock it away!

1005.Name: Extreme Low Tide
1005.Description:
Daily
11:00-12:00; 13:00-14:00
16:00-17:00; 18:00-19:00
21:00-22:00; 23:00-24:00
Recommend: 2-10 Players
Balance carefully across the collapsing gaps. Step steadily and try to stay until the end!

1006.Name: Wave Dodgeball
1006.Description:
Daily
10:00-11:00; 12:00-13:00
15:00-16:00; 17:00-18:00
20:00-21:00; 22:00-23:00
Recommend: 2-10 Players
Arguably the perfect summer sport! Dash around while dodging water balloons from all directions. Can you last to the very end?

1007.Name: Interdimensional Punishment
1007.Description:
Daily 10:00-24:00
Recommend: 1 Player
Punch all that pent-up emotion back to another dimension! Strike that mysterious rival who loves adding "little troubles" to your adventure with a heavy blow, and watch what unfolds...?!

1110.Name: Starlight
1110.Description: Climb to the top of the tower and take in the view. Perfect for spacing out, enjoying the breeze, and... sneaking a look at the island's lively bustle!

1111.Name: Starland Town
1111.Description: The first stop upon arriving at Starland. Decide from here: will you play Tag, watch the sea, play Mahjong, or just wander with the crowd?

1112.Name: Aurora Stage
1112.Description: When the lights come on, this is the spotlight of Starland. Step onto the stage and shine like a superstar!

1113.Name: House of Dreams: Daylight
1113.Description: A place made for the protagonist. It lets you face your own brilliance until standing at the center of the crowd feels natural and you're ready to meet the gaze of the world.

1114.Name: Boarlet Waltz
1114.Description: Ride the Boarlets in gentle circles. Just empty your mind and spin with them, and your worries will be left behind.

1115.Name: Star Orbiter
1115.Description: Its entire purpose is to stretch time, granting those in the cabins the brief privilege of defying gravity within a circular cycle. Legend says that when the wheel reaches its highest point, the unspoken confessions of those nearby can be heard (Note: authenticity unverified)... Either way, this is the perfect spot on Starland to while away the hours.

1116.Name: Starland Club
1116.Description:
Use rules, chips, and a little luck for a battle of wits (for geniuses)!
[Starland Match] Mahjong

1117.Name: House of Wonders
1117.Description:
Inside the containers—you'll find heartbeats, thrills, and daring adventures! Dive into an incredible game with your friends in this illusion. Will the next moment bring laughter... or screams? Only you can find out!
[Wonder Rumble] Tag
[Wonder Rumble] Ee-chan, Don't Stare at Me!
[Wonder Rumble] City Rally

1118.Name: Meowlux Special
1118.Description: Try your luck at Cat's Eye Emporium for a chance to take home exclusive items from the Meowlux Merchant Guild!

1119.Name: Starland Store
1119.Description: Meowlux Stewards are waiting for your visit~

90001.Name: The Drifting Cocoon (Season Lv.10)
90001.Description:
Recommended Illusion Strength: 400
Adventurers may enter the Drowning Dreamland through the Drifting Cocoon. Defeat the phantom monsters inside to obtain Phantom Factors!
You can obtain a cumulative weekly maximum of 100 Phantom Factors from any Drowning Dreamland. The Phantom Factor level increases over the course of the season.
While in the Drowning Dreamland, your Hallucination Value will continuously build up. Once full, you will be expelled from the Drowning Dreamland, returned to the real world, and will enter the Lost state. You cannot re-enter the Drowning Dreamland while in the Lost state.
Adventurers can initially withstand the Drowning Dreamland for 30 minutes. This duration is extended by 2 minutes for every level your Deep-Slumber Psychoscope is above the Drifting Cocoon's level, and reduced by 2 minutes for every level it is below. The Lost state lasts for 5 minutes.

90002.Name: The Drifting Cocoon (Season Lv.18)
90002.Description:
Recommended Illusion Strength: 685
Adventurers may enter the Drowning Dreamland through the Drifting Cocoon. Defeat the phantom monsters inside to obtain Phantom Factors!

While in the Drowning Dreamland, your Hallucination Value will continuously build up. Once full, you will be expelled from the Drowning Dreamland, returned to the real world, and will enter the Lost state. You cannot re-enter the Drowning Dreamland while in the Lost state.
Adventurers can initially withstand the Drowning Dreamland for 30 minutes. This duration is extended by 2 minutes for every level your Deep-Slumber Psychoscope is above the Drifting Cocoon's level, and reduced by 2 minutes for every level it is below. The Lost state lasts for 5 minutes.

90008.Name: The Drifting Cocoon (Season Lv.50)
90008.Description:
Recommended Illusion Strength: 1293
Adventurers may enter the Drowning Dreamland through the Drifting Cocoon. Defeat the phantom monsters inside to obtain Phantom Factors!
You can obtain a cumulative weekly maximum of 100 Phantom Factors from any Drowning Dreamland. The Phantom Factor level increases over the course of the season.

Adventurers can initially withstand the Drowning Dreamland for 30 minutes. This duration is extended by 2 minutes for every level your Deep-Slumber Psychoscope is above the Drifting Cocoon's level, and reduced by 2 minutes for every level it is below. The Lost state lasts for 5 minutes.

90009.Name: The Drifting Cocoon (Season Lv.55)
90009.Description:
Recommended Illusion Strength: 1418
Adventurers may enter the Drowning Dreamland through the Drifting Cocoon. Defeat the phantom monsters inside to obtain Phantom Factors!
You can obtain a cumulative weekly maximum of 100 Phantom Factors from any Drowning Dreamland. The Phantom Factor level increases over the course of the season.
While in the Drowning Dreamland, your Hallucination Value will continuously build up. Once full, you will be expelled from the Drowning Dreamland, returned to the real world, and will enter the Lost state. You cannot re-enter the Drowning Dreamland while in the Lost state.
Adventurers can initially withstand the Drowning Dreamland for 30 minutes. This duration is extended by 2 minutes for every level your Deep-Slumber Psychoscope is above the Drifting Cocoon's level, and reduced by 2 minutes for every level it is below. The Lost state lasts for 5 minutes.
